好友充值后，您可获得充值额的: After a friend tops up, you earn
邀请好友注册，好友充值后您可获得相应奖励: Invite friends to sign up — earn rewards when they top up
好友充值后邀请者获得充值额的对应比例（0 = 关闭，最大 100）: Share of a friend's top-up the referrer earns (0 = off, max 100)
当上游无 /api/pricing 时，用 romaapi 公开模型价格 × 此: When upstream has no /api/pricing, fall back to romaapi public model price × this multiplier; leave empty or 0 to disable.
